title: Interviews with Men on Work and Self-Care 2017-2018
description: The data includes interviews with men working in the media, health and social services and logistics sectors about their working life, health and self-care. The interviews started with questions about the interviewee's work situation and job description. They were also asked about work-related questions, such as their own workload. The majority of the interview questions were related to self-care. The questions included what the interviewee thinks self-care means, how it is discussed in the inte
